rationale_per_step.remove-dead-vertex-env-requirement: Maintenance: remove unused VERTEX_API_KEY from required env schema (embeddings use only OpenAI provider; vertexai flag in Google LLM is unrelated). Reduces onboarding friction and stale config surface area.
rationale_per_step.add-composite-eval-smoke-script: DX/Infra: add a single 'eval:smoke' script that runs the existing pure zero-I/O smoke evals together. Improves DX, simplifies CI/docs/AGENTS, reduces repetition after the eval smoke work. No new tests.
rationale_per_step.mocked-embedding-scenario-eval: Testing/Observability: add a scenario-level eval for the semantic search path (or research) using mocked embeddings. Exercises extract/parse/build + scoring or agent loop without live keys or DB. Directly supports measurable research quality and coverage per vision and prior PROGRESS handoffs.
